---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for AudioEnhancerMAX
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case
Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the workflow you want to improve.

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Target Users
Who would benefit from this feature? (podcasters, musicians, sound designers, etc.)

## Reference
Links to similar features in other tools, papers, or implementations.

## Additional Context
Mockups, audio examples, or any other context.
